cityThesis: Run one proof-led warehouse wedge with a secure adjacent defense follow-up path.

rightsPath.summary: Private controlled interiors require documented site authorization before any capture or buyer-visible proof motion.

validationBlockers.summary: Shield AI must stay off the standard public hosted-review path until the secure containerized delivery path is explicitly validated.

issueSeeds.title: Assemble San Diego proof packs and publish the first proof-ready listing
issueSeeds.summary: Turn the first rights-cleared San Diego warehouse asset into a buyer-visible proof pack with hosted-review routing.
successCriteria: At least one San Diego proof-ready listing or equivalent proof pack exists with exact-site labeling.
The proof pack includes provenance, coverage boundaries, hosted-review routing, and next-step guidance.

issueSeeds.title: Prepare San Diego proof-led outbound package and first touches
issueSeeds.summary: Prepare exact-site outbound for Brain Corp and keep Shield AI on the secure follow-up path.
successCriteria: Brain Corp first-touch copy is prepared with exact-site hosted-review posture.
Shield AI remains routed to a secure scoped follow-up path instead of the public hosted-review lane.

issueSeeds.title: Publish the San Diego launch scorecard and blocker view
issueSeeds.summary: Keep San Diego measurable from first outreach through proof and hosted review.
successCriteria: The scorecard reports supply, demand, proof, and hosted-review milestones using the approved event vocabulary.
Missing evidence remains explicit instead of being collapsed into narrative progress.

metricsDependencies.notes: Track inbound buyer or operator requests with city and source attribution.
Track the first buyer-visible San Diego proof pack delivery.
Track when a hosted review is genuinely ready to open.
Track the first hosted review start.
Track when a buyer thread moves into commercial handling.
Track when proof motion stalls despite active routing.

namedClaims.subject: Brain Corp
namedClaims.claim: Brain Corp is the primary exact-site buyer target for the San Diego warehouse wedge.

namedClaims.subject: Shield AI
namedClaims.claim: Shield AI stays on a secure scoped follow-up path and must not use the standard public hosted-review lane.
